qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Path traversal via ZIP extraction (ZipSlip) allows arbitrary file write
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns ZIP entry path traversal in src/Util/Zip.php and upload/import extraction paths, not the Stampe module SQL query that concatenates POST module into zz_prints.id_module.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Missing authorization in user management allows privilege escalation
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns $skip_permissions = true in modules/utenti/actions.php and missing authorization for user-management operations, not the vulnerable SQL construction in modules/stampe/actions.php.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: CSRF protection disabled by default enables cross-site request forgery attacks
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns default CSRF protection configuration and cross-site request forgery, not SQL injection in the Stampe update endpoint.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Arbitrary file read via path traversal in invoice import preview
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns GET filename path traversal in plugins/importFE_ZIP/view.php and plugins/importFE/view.php, not the Stampe module SQL injection sink.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described root cause: modules/stampe/actions.php op=update directly concatenating POST module into an UPDATE zz_prints query without prepare() sanitization. The accepted qualifying findings cover unrelated ZIP extraction, user-management authorization, CSRF configuration, and invoice-preview file-read paths.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-qx9p-w3vj-q24q identifies an authenticated SQL injection in modules/stampe/actions.php where post('module') is concatenated into UPDATE zz_prints SET predefined = 0 WHERE id_module = ...

logs/orchestrator_final_response.md lists four accepted qualifying vulnerabilities: zipslip_path_traversal, authorization_bypass_user_management, csrf_protection_disabled, and file_read_path_traversal.

Session search found no final qualifying vulnerability_report.json that names modules/stampe/actions.php, zz_prints, id_module, post('module'), EXTRACTVALUE, UPDATEXML, or the Stampe update SQL source-to-sink path.
